'''âs-g-w-l''' ('''kasagweloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quintate|quintate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-w-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quintate|quintate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-g-w-l
|-
! Lemma
| kasagweloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisagweloko|thisagweloko]] || [[word:jisagweloko|jisagweloko]] || [[word:shisagweloko|shisagweloko]] || [[word:kisagweloko|kisagweloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusagweloko|thuthusagweloko]] || [[word:jujusagweloko|jujusagweloko]] || [[word:shushusagweloko|shushusagweloko]] || [[word:kukusagweloko|kukusagweloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosagweloko|thosagweloko]] || [[word:josagweloko|josagweloko]] || [[word:shosagweloko|shosagweloko]] || [[word:kosagweloko|kosagweloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosagweloko|thosagweloko]] || [[word:josagweloko|josagweloko]] || [[word:shosagweloko|shosagweloko]] || [[word:kosagweloko|kosagweloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsagweloko|thĂŠsagweloko]] || [[word:jĂŠsagweloko|jĂŠsagweloko]] || [[word:shĂŠsagweloko|shĂŠsagweloko]] || [[word:kĂŠsagweloko|kĂŠsagweloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasagweloko|thathasagweloko]] || [[word:jajasagweloko|jajasagweloko]] || [[word:shashasagweloko|shashasagweloko]] || [[word:kakasagweloko|kakasagweloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasagweloko|thasagweloko]] || [[word:jasagweloko|jasagweloko]] || [[word:shasagweloko|shasagweloko]] || [[word:kasagweloko|kasagweloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasagweloko|thasagweloko]] || [[word:jasagweloko|jasagweloko]] || [[word:shasagweloko|shasagweloko]] || [[word:kasagweloko|kasagweloko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
